docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED JAN-20-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOOTH, SHANE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD. PLAINTIFF JESSICA SZEMRAJ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY SZEMRAJ, JESSICA
